channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Netherlands vs Sweden: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Netherlands vs Sweden for free online and from anywhere as the Dutch seek a vital win against an in-form Sweden at the World Cup 2026.

item.title: Moves of the Diamond Hand is an unfinished, irresistibly weird dice-based RPG
item.description: From its opening minutes, Moves of the Diamond Hand is upfront about what it offers: You're going to have a lot of strange conversations, and you're going to roll a lot of dice. Get on board with this proposition, and the reward is one of the most creative roleplaying games I've seen in years, even […]

item.title: Qu’est ce qu’un Prompt IA ? Comment en réaliser un pertinent et comment le maintenir à jour ?
item.description: Alors que l'IA s'impose de plus en plus dans les usages quotidiens, vient en parallèle son lexique à comprendre et définir. Le prompt est devenu le mot-clé de l'IA générative, mais que recouvre-t-il vraiment ? Voici notre dossier de définition pour comprendre ce qu'est un prompt et comment bien le réaliser.

item.title: Cette batterie domestique ultra-fine se branche sur une simple prise pour stocker votre énergie solaire
item.description: Et si stocker l'énergie de vos panneaux solaires devenait aussi simple que de brancher un smartphone ? C'est le pari du constructeur Samduo, qui lance en Europe la gamme Nex E : des batteries domestiques ultra-fines, plug & play, capables de s'intégrer à n'importe quelle installation existante sans travaux.

item.title: 'This might actually force some actual brain cells to fire': Norway is banning younger school kids from using generative AI
item.description: Norway is taking steps to limit how generative AI can be used in schools from the start of the next school year.

item.title: Car manufacturers are ditching Android Auto in 2026: Here's why
item.description: Car buyers love Android Auto. Automakers? Not so much.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs Honor 600 : lequel offre le meilleur rapport qualité-prix sous les 500 € ?
item.description: Deux smartphones milieu de gamme très populaires voient aujourd’hui leur prix passer sous la barre des 500 euros. D'un côté, le Samsung Galaxy A57 et de l'autre le Honor 600. Mais alors, faut-il préférer la force tranquille de Samsung ou l’alternative ambitieuse de Honor ? On fait le point.

item.title: Rivals season 2 star teases 'pretty full-on scenes' in November 2026 episodes — and fans need to be prepared for 'absolute madness' in these three
item.description: We've got to wait another five months until the rest of Rivals season 2 drops on Hulu and Disney+ — but expect 'absolute madness' when they do.

item.title: Watching the World Cup with friends? Here's which spilled pint will damage your phone the most — beware of cider!
item.description: Beer-based buffoonery during football matches poses a serious risk to your smartphone — here's which beverages are the most hazardous.

item.title: The big TechRadar Entertainment interview: Toy Story 5 VFX supervisor Thomas Jordan talks new toy designs, Easter eggs, Bonnie and Blaze, and Pixar's experiments with AI
item.description: TechRadar sits down with Toy Story 5's VFX team lead to discuss the new tech and secrets behind the popular Pixar film franchise's latest entry.

item.title: Amazon has quietly released its most popular Prime Day deals — 65% off Fire TVs, Blink Cameras, Kindle, Ring Doorbells, Echo speakers, and more
item.description: While Prime Day technically starts on Tuesday, it has quietly released its device deals early, with up to 65% off Fire TVs, Blink cameras, Ring Doorbells, Echo speakers, and more.
